_reviewNote: No reliable free structured feed exists for vignette prices — a 6-month GitHub Action opens a reminder issue to review this file by hand against the official portals listed in each note.

vignettes.note: No per-km motorway tolls, but the motorway vignette is mandatory. Annual only (valid Dec 1 – Jan 31 of the following year, ~14 months). Motorcycles need their own e-vignette, registered to the plate. Source: via.admin.ch, 2026.

Motorcycles have their own cheaper category. 1-day, 10-day, 2-month and annual e-vignettes available (asfinag.at). Some Alpine tunnels (Brenner, Tauern, Arlberg…) charge an EXTRA per-passage toll on top. Prices ~2026 — verify.
Motorcycle category is half the car price. E-vignette registered to the plate (evinjeta.dars.si). Prices ~2026 — verify.
Motorcycles use the cheaper D1M category (nemzetiutdij.hu). 10-day, monthly and annual options. Price ~2026 — verify.
Motorcycles are EXEMPT from the Czech e-vignette — ride the motorway for free (edalnice.cz).
Motorcycles are EXEMPT from the Slovak e-vignette (eznamka.sk).
Motorcycles are EXEMPT from the Romanian rovinietă.
Motorcycles are EXEMPT from the Bulgarian e-vignette (bgtoll.bg).
